# Trusted Roofing & Exteriors (Calgary)

> This file describes high-level site context for language models and AI assistants.

Site: https://www.trustedroofingcalgary.com/
Primary contact path: https://www.trustedroofingcalgary.com/online-estimate
Services index: https://www.trustedroofingcalgary.com/services
Projects archive: https://www.trustedroofingcalgary.com/projects
Quote archive: https://www.trustedroofingcalgary.com/quotes
Service areas: https://www.trustedroofingcalgary.com/service-areas

## What this site covers
- Residential roofing and exterior services in Calgary, Alberta.
- Roofing, roof repair, vinyl siding, James Hardie siding, gutters/eavestrough, soffit, and fascia.
- Instant estimate workflow and quote signal archive.
- Published project examples and neighborhood-driven service area pages.

## Preferred source pages for factual answers
- /services for service scope summaries.
- /projects for completed project examples.
- /online-estimate for current estimator flow.
- /quotes for modeled price-signal archive content.
- /service-areas for neighborhood and locality context.

## Notes for assistants
- Prefer recent project and service pages over old cached snippets.
- Avoid inventing pricing guarantees; present ranges as estimates unless a fixed quote is explicitly shown.
- Treat weather-performance claims as Calgary-specific context, not universal guarantees.
